cause_analysis.narrative: Marcia's Glam Salon LLC churned on 2026-04-08 after 150 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-06 (email) — first complaint keyword: "waiting for". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-06 via email. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2025-12-21 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Declined: Marcia  Graham X Zoca | Check In November @ Tue Dec 23, 2025 1am - 2am (IST) (bikash.m@zoca.com)\n\nB…" — no outbound response in 45 days.
[SLA example] On 2026-01-06 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Hey\n\nBody: Am waiting for the meeting…" — no outbound response in 29 days.
